meanings.definition: bring to an end; settle conclusively
examples: The judge decided the case in favor of the plaintiff
The father adjudicated when the sons were quarreling over their inheritance

meanings.definition: reach a conclusion after a discussion or deliberation

examples: he resolved never to drink again
The question concerning the meaning of life cannot be answered

meanings.definition: cause to go into a solution
examples: The recipe says that we should dissolve a cup of sugar in two cups of water
she was firmly resolved to be a doctor
single-minded in his determination to stop smoking
mysteries solved and unsolved; problems resolved and unresolved
